name: ground_truth_cp9_backup_frequency_ambiguous
description: Ground-truth fixture modeled on the Example System IATT assessment pattern for CP-9 backup frequency. Simulates a scenario where backup documentation exists but frequency requirements are not explicitly stated — the assessor can't determine if the backup schedule meets the organization-defined RTO/RPO without additional information. LLM returns Compliant with confidence 0.25 (well under 0.35 threshold), triggering confidence-floor abstain. Tests the abstain gate with a different control family (CP) and backup-specific evidence.

ccis_row.guidance: 000534: The organization conducts backups of user-level information contained in the information system per organization-defined frequency consistent with recovery time and recovery point objectives.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment obtains and examines the contingency plan, backup procedures, and backup logs to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed conducts backups of user-level information at the defined frequency.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Contingency plan excerpt — references backup requirements but does not specify frequency or RTO/RPO targets.
- Backup job log (partial) — shows recent backup executions but schedule interval is unclear.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined contingency plan and backup job logs; confirmed that user-level backups are being conducted, though frequency alignment with RTO/RPO targets could not be fully verified from available documentation.
